'''âth-l-z''' ('''kathalaz''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:cameltoe|cameltoe]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-l-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cameltoe|cameltoe]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âth-l-z
|-
! Lemma
| kathalaz
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thithalaz|thithalaz]] || [[word:jithalaz|jithalaz]] || [[word:shithalaz|shithalaz]] || [[word:kithalaz|kithalaz]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuthalaz|thuthuthalaz]] || [[word:jujuthalaz|jujuthalaz]] || [[word:shushuthalaz|shushuthalaz]] || [[word:kukuthalaz|kukuthalaz]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuthalaz|thuthalaz]] || [[word:juthalaz|juthalaz]] || [[word:shuthalaz|shuthalaz]] || [[word:kuthalaz|kuthalaz]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuthalaz|thuthalaz]] || [[word:juthalaz|juthalaz]] || [[word:shuthalaz|shuthalaz]] || [[word:kuthalaz|kuthalaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thethalaz|thethalaz]] || [[word:jethalaz|jethalaz]] || [[word:shethalaz|shethalaz]] || [[word:kethalaz|kethalaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothothalaz|thothothalaz]] || [[word:jojothalaz|jojothalaz]] || [[word:shoshothalaz|shoshothalaz]] || [[word:kokothalaz|kokothalaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thothalaz|thothalaz]] || [[word:jothalaz|jothalaz]] || [[word:shothalaz|shothalaz]] || [[word:kothalaz|kothalaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thothalaz|thothalaz]] || [[word:jothalaz|jothalaz]] || [[word:shothalaz|shothalaz]] || [[word:kothalaz|kothalaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠthalaz|thĂŠthalaz]] || [[word:jĂŠthalaz|jĂŠthalaz]] || [[word:shĂŠthalaz|shĂŠthalaz]] || [[word:kĂŠthalaz|kĂŠthalaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathathalaz|thathathalaz]] || [[word:jajathalaz|jajathalaz]] || [[word:shashathalaz|shashathalaz]] || [[word:kakathalaz|kakathalaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thathalaz|thathalaz]] || [[word:jathalaz|jathalaz]] || [[word:shathalaz|shathalaz]] || [[word:kathalaz|kathalaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thathalaz|thathalaz]] || [[word:jathalaz|jathalaz]] || [[word:shathalaz|shathalaz]] || [[word:kathalaz|kathalaz]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shathalaz|shathalaz]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshathalaz|goshathalaz]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishathalaz|gokishathalaz]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shathalaznĂŒ|shathalaznĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshathalaznknĂŒ|goshathalaznknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishathalaznĂŒ|gokishathalaznĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shathalazshĂ«|shathalazshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshathalaznkshĂ«|goshathalaznkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishathalazshĂ«|gokishathalazshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathalazro|shathalazro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathalaznkro|goshathalaznkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathalazro|gokishathalazro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shathalazmu|shathalazmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathalaznkmu|goshathalaznkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathalazmu|gokishathalazmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shathalazsher|shathalazsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshathalaznksher|goshathalaznksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishathalazsher|gokishathalazsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shathalazng|shathalazng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshathalaznkng|goshathalaznkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishathalazng|gokishathalazng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shathalazya|shathalazya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshathalaznkya|goshathalaznkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishathalazya|gokishathalazya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shathalazyam|shathalazyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshathalaznkyam|goshathalaznkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishathalazyam|gokishathalazyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shathalaznĂŒshĂ«|shathalaznĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshathalaznknĂŒshĂ«|goshathalaznknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishathalaznĂŒshĂ«|gokishathalaznĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathalaznĂŒro|shathalaznĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathalaznknĂŒro|goshathalaznknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathalaznĂŒro|gokishathalaznĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shathalaznĂŒmu|shathalaznĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathalaznknĂŒmu|goshathalaznknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathalaznĂŒmu|gokishathalaznĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shathalazshĂ«nĂŒ|shathalazshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshathalaznkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshathalaznkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishathalazshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishathalazshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathalazshĂ«ro|shathalazshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathalaznkshĂ«ro|goshathalaznkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathalazshĂ«ro|gokishathalazshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shathalazshĂ«mu|shathalazshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathalaznkshĂ«mu|goshathalaznkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathalazshĂ«mu|gokishathalazshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shathalazronĂŒ|shathalazronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshathalaznkronĂŒ|goshathalaznkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishathalazronĂŒ|gokishathalazronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shathalazroshĂ«|shathalazroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshathalaznkroshĂ«|goshathalaznkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishathalazroshĂ«|gokishathalazroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shathalazromu|shathalazromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathalaznkromu|goshathalaznkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathalazromu|gokishathalazromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shathalazmunĂŒ|shathalazmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshathalaznkmunĂŒ|goshathalaznkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishathalazmunĂŒ|gokishathalazmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shathalazmushĂ«|shathalazmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshathalaznkmushĂ«|goshathalaznkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishathalazmushĂ«|gokishathalazmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathalazmuro|shathalazmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathalaznkmuro|goshathalaznkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathalazmuro|gokishathalazmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==

{{wordpage|dcef9d8}}
